risk_summary: The 2022 floods caused major setbacks to project progress, contributing to slow implementation timeline and delays in hydropower project development.
evidence_quote: Major setbacks include the 2022 floods and a lack of participation from pre-qualified applicants in the bidding for the Gabral-Kalam Hydropower Project (GKHPP).

risk_title: Lack of Bidder Participation in Hydropower Procurement
risk_summary: Pre-qualified applicants have not participated in bidding for the Gabral-Kalam Hydropower Project, indicating potential security concerns, accessibility issues, or conflict-related barriers to private sector engagement in the project area.
evidence_quote: Major setbacks include the 2022 floods and a lack of participation from pre-qualified applicants in the bidding for the Gabral-Kalam Hydropower Project (GKHPP).
